purpose: Base-bound exact expansion of every F151 tree/glob deletion. Directory or glob placeholders never count as Git changed paths.

gate.expansion_command: tracked-tree-delete uses git ls-tree -r <base_sha> -- <literal-tree-prefix>; tracked-exact-delete uses git ls-tree <base_sha> -- <exact-repository-relative-path>; no Python glob or Git pathspec wildcard is used
gate.required_source_patterns: exact set of S047 resolved_globs for tree prefixes plus S047 resolved_paths whose exact_additional action is delete; every source_pattern is bijective with one of those declarations
gate.changed_path_materialization: use entries[].path only; deduplicate paths shared by exact and glob sources
gate.base_object_verification: mode, object type and object id must exactly match git ls-tree at base_sha
gate.new_or_untracked_targets: must be exact declared_new_paths; globs cannot create ownership

negative_fixtures: SDK expansion missing any of the six base tracked files fails
skills/llm-config directory placeholder without SKILL.md fails
glob gains or loses a base tracked match without manifest update fails
a zero-directory dotfile represented by ** or PurePath.match instead of an exact tracked path fails
an untracked target matched only by a glob remains unowned and fails
